title: Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Himalaya Drug Company Global Group:
Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company Global Group!
